skills.name: Wagon Wheel
skills.description: Perform an upward swing with your weapon, launching an enemy up.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Cross Guard
skills.description: Hold a defensive stance that can block with a one or two-handed sword equipped in the main slot. You can not evade while holding the stance and the block chance increases. When blocking the enemy's attack, the [Detect Weakness] buff is applied for 5 seconds, and the Cooldown of Cross Guard is applied for #{CaptionTime}# seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Block Chance by CaptionRatio2 %
Increases Final Damage by CaptionRatio %
Cross Guard Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Moulinet
skills.description: Inflict damage on enemies by swinging your sword around to create continuous attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Skyliner
skills.description: Slash the enemy sideways for 2.5 seconds per 0.5 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Crosscut
skills.description: Charge towards an enemy and cut a cross on their body, inflicting [Bleeding].
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Bleeding] Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Defiance
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Coffee
Maps
Doll
Increases damage to the boss CaptionRatio %

attributes.name: Wagon Wheel: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Wagon Wheel] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:
* Increases [Cross Guard]'s block increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* 10% increases additionally at maximum level
